1100001010000100 0110101100001110 1 -> sum: 0010110110010011, cout: 1
0111010000111011 0110011001010111 0 -> sum: 1101101010010010, cout: 0

0011110101101111 0110101000111010 0 -> sum: 1010011110101001, cout: 0
0110110101010001 1000111100010110 1 -> sum: 1111110001101000, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
